destinations.evidence: Ritual add-ons read SCHEDULER_ADDRESS and fall back to the current hard-coded Scheduler address.

equivalence_argument: Mapped in nodebuilder dependency: RitualAddOns::default supports the override and fallback semantics.
rationale: The assigned candidate directly supports the environment override semantics, and current referenced code still parses SCHEDULER_ADDRESS before falling back.
statement: RitualAddOns::default should parse SCHEDULER_ADDRESS when it is set to a valid address; when it is unset, it should fall back to the current hard-coded scheduler address. Current local evidence shows the fallback as 0x56e776BAE2DD60664b69Bd5F865F1180ffB7D58B.
suggested_falsification_tests: Set SCHEDULER_ADDRESS before constructing RitualAddOns and assert scheduler_address equals the override.
Unset SCHEDULER_ADDRESS and assert fallback is 0x56e776BAE2DD60664b69Bd5F865F1180ffB7D58B.
title: Ritual add-ons use SCHEDULER_ADDRESS override
